description: Unidentified narrative text in Judaeo-Arabic. Treasure hunting guide? The speaker says that they built "domes on the left and the right" and deposited 120 baskets, 100 containing dinars and 20 containing gems. Then "I fled from Egypt.... and I have written..."
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
